---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# os_copula

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

Code for project on using optimal scaling for ordering of discrete/categorical variables for copula estimation.
